name: Golfzon Leadbetter Academy - World Headquarters at Reunion
about: Golfzon Leadbetter Academy is a premier golf training facility that merges expert instruction with state-of-the-art technology. The academy offers programs for golfers of all skill levels, including private lessons, group sessions, junior golf academies, and corporate events. With a focus on data-driven swing analysis and personalized coaching, the facility utilizes cutting-edge technology to enhance player performance. Their Orlando headquarters features a comprehensive range of services from club fitting to simulator booking, designed to provide a world-class golfing experience in a professional, cutting-edge environment.
why_golfers_like_it: Access to premium technology including the GOLFZON GDR MAX simulator and advanced swing analysis tools
Personalized coaching from award-winning GLE Certified instructors with video swing analysis included
Comprehensive program offerings including junior development, college placement support, and elite instructor training

food_and_drink.notes: No information about food service provided on the website
No information about alcohol service provided on the website

simulator_hardware.notes: Primary simulator technology used at the facility

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, you should bring your own clubs. The academy also offers custom club fitting services if you need equipment.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No information about bringing outside food or drinks is provided on the website.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: No specific information about the time required to play 18 holes is provided.

faq.question: Is this venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue offers junior golf programs including camps, morning programs, and a full-time junior academy with a 99% college placement rate.
